title: GovSchema Document
description: Meta-schema for a GovSchema document: a versioned, machine-readable definition of a government form or process. A document that validates against this meta-schema is a well-formed GovSchema schema. v0.2 adds an OPTIONAL `edition` axis for time-versioned forms (a new tax/award year is a new edition, not a version bump); see SPEC §5.7 and GSP-0005. This is a standards artifact published by the GovSchema foundation; it does not imply endorsement by any government.

$schema.description: URI of the GovSchema meta-schema this document conforms to.

govschemaVersion.description: Version of the GovSchema specification this document targets.

id.description: Registry identifier, equal to the document's path under registry/ (excluding version). Lowercase, slash-separated, starting with an ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. Example: us/ca/dmv/vehicle-registration-renewal

version.description: Semantic version of THIS schema. See VERSIONING.md for what MAJOR/MINOR/PATCH mean for a schema.

status.description: Lifecycle status. 'verified' requires a current verification record matching the live source.

subdivision.description: ISO 3166-2 subdivision code, when the process is subnational. Example: US-CA

language.description: BCP-47 language tag of the source form. Example: en-US

edition.description: OPTIONAL temporal axis for time-versioned forms. A new tax/award year is a new EDITION, not a SemVer version bump; editions coexist (§5.7). When present, the document is stored at registry/<id>/<edition.label>/<version>/schema.json and edition.label MUST equal the <edition> path segment (§10 rule 6). See GSP-0005.

source.description: The live government source this schema was derived from.

documentRef.description: Official form number or document reference, when one exists. Example: REG 156

verification.description: Record of how and when this schema was confirmed against the live source. See practices/ for methods.

method.description: Identifier of the verification practice used. Example: manual-source-review-v1

license.description: SPDX or Creative Commons identifier under which this schema content is published. Example: CC-BY-4.0

steps.description: Optional ordered description of the process flow.

scheme.description: The kind of edition cycle. us-tax-year: US calendar tax year (e.g. 2025). gb-tax-year: UK tax year running 6 Apr to 5 Apr (e.g. 2024-25). award-year: financial-aid award year (e.g. 2025-26). The vocabulary is extensible via an additive spec MINOR; additionalProperties:false here means a new scheme requires an explicit add.

label.description: The edition key, e.g. 2025 or 2024-25. MUST equal the <edition> registry path segment (SPEC §10 rule 6).

name.description: Stable machine key for the field.

label.description: Human-facing label as it appears on the source form.

sourceRef.description: Where this field appears on the source form. Example: Section 2, Box 4a

fields.description: Names of fields collected in this step.

next.description: id of the next step, or omitted for the final step.
